# Third-Party Code Boundary

This directory is reserved for notes, wrappers, or patches related to external projects.

Do not vendor model weights, 3D-FRONT, 3D-FUTURE, Qwen-Image, Qwen2.5-VL, DiffSynth-Studio, SemLayoutDiff, or EditRoom into this local skeleton. Server-side experiments should use explicit paths documented in `README_SERVER.md`.
